calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appeaances:
Roger E. Jackson, Esq., T:707.318.2994, specially appearing for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court's tentative ruling required defendant to appear and present evidence regarding the amount of money in the bank account, the funds that are traceable to his paid earnings and what amount of money can be remitted to the creditor to service the debt. There was no appearance by defendant.

After hearing, the Court takes PLAINTIFF SUNLAN LDP, LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Michael Miller under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
